author: Vertyco
description: Easily edit any message sent by the bot via context menu commands. Quick Edit opens a modal pre-filled with the message's existing parts, and Full Edit opens a fully interactive editor with control over content, embeds, fields, and v2 text containers.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
install_msg:
Thank you for installing EmbEditor! Right click (or long press) any of my messages and use the `Quick Edit` or `Full Edit` context commands under Apps.

DOCUMENTATION: https://github.com/vertyco/vrt-cogs/blob/main/embeditor/README.md
short: Edit the bot's messages with an interactive editor
